# Apache HTTPD (AJP) — root-to-custom-context-push-url

AJP root-to-custom-context with VAADIN_PUSH_URL=/VAADIN/push; adds a ws:// proxy block for /VAADIN/push that maps to the backend's /app/VAADIN/push.

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

Apache HTTPD config (`vaadin.conf`):

```apache
<location / >
    ProxyPass         ajp://vaadin:8009/app/
    ProxyPassReverse  /app/
    ProxyPassReverseCookiePath "/app" "/"
</Location>

<Location /VAADIN/push>
    ProxyPass               ws://vaadin:8080/app/VAADIN/push
</Location>

<Location /HILLA/push>
    ProxyPass               ws://vaadin:8080/app/HILLA/push
</Location>
```
